svg.text: Appendix · Full Component Architecture (file & module level)
Frontend (static/, templates/) — vanilla JS, no build
config.py — _Config (dirs, devices, model paths, OFFLINE) · auth.py login_manager · @after_request
GLM-OCR subprocess (own venv) → MLX server localhost:8080 [external]
No skill-selection layer in the live HTTP agent: AgentCore is built with an EMPTY skill registry →
helpers: save_artifact · get_or_create_conversation · add_message · add_agent_message · add_agent_artifacts ·
